document_title: OSHA Accident Report Detail 180500.015 (Premier Fence, LLC) and Inspection Detail 1814187.015 — Three Employees Struck By Vehicle
notes: OSHA IMIS Accident Report Detail combined with the matched Inspection Detail at https://osha.prod.pace.dol.gov/ords/imis/establishment.inspection_detail?id=1814187.015 . Fatal accident on I-91 in West Springfield, MA, March 28 2025 — three guardrail-repair workers killed when a vehicle struck them. Two Serious citations under 19260200 G01/G02, both contested. Case OPEN as of retrieval.
